name: animal-compliance-checkpoint
description: Animal/dog compliance checklist and routing — not legal or veterinary advice

steps.text: Skill animal-compliance-agent. Danger/attack → 111. No invented fines or seizures.

steps.goal: Using skill animal-compliance-agent and knowledge/animals/animal-compliance-framework.md, produce: (1) primary route (111 vs council animal control vs MPI vs tenancy) (2) owner-checklist or complaint-route as fits (3) jurisdiction named or asked (4) rental/property notes if relevant (5) explicit non-claims. Do not invent bylaw fine schedules or veterinary treatment.
criteria: Council vs MPI path distinguished when relevant
No invented fines or legal outcomes
